case_title: OSORIO, JOSE LUIS vs. VU, PETER, INDIVIDUALLY et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF OSORIO, JOSE LUIS

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNED TO ALL COLLECTIONS INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSORIO, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT VU, PETER, INDIVIDUALLY VU, MAI NGUYEN, INDIVIDUALLY PETER'S COMPLETE HARDWOOD FLOOR SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSORIO, JOSE LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VU, PETER, INDIVIDUALLY VU, MAI NGUYEN, INDIVIDUALLY PETER'S COMPLETE HARDWOOD FLOOR SERVICES $2,204.88 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,293.88
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: POLLARD, RALPH LOUIS SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR OSORIO, JOSE LUIS

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSORIO, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT VU, PETER, INDIVIDUALLY VU, MAI NGUYEN, INDIVIDUALLY PETER'S COMPLETE HARDWOOD FLOOR SERVICES
